center.name: Coastal strand
center.summary: Coastal strand是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Micronesian myzomela，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It also inhabits coconut plantations, coastal strand, savanna brush, villages, towns, and gardens.{{Citation |last=Higgins |first=Peter |title=Micronesian Myzomela (Myzomela rubratra) |date=2020 |work=Birds of the World |editor-last=Billerman |editor-first=Shawn M
